name: Filbert Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the nuts in a heavy skillet, rubbing them lightly to remove some of the skin.
2. Grate the nuts finely using a processor or nut grinder.
3. Mix the grated nuts with sugar, vanilla extract, and enough sour cream (up to 4 teaspoons) until well combined.
4. Split the cake into two layers.
5. Spread one cut surface of each layer with jam.
6. Place the nut filling on one layer, then cover with the other layer.
7. Press lightly to ensure the filling is distributed evenly.
8. Wrap the assembled cake in foil and refrigerate overnight.
9. Glaze with chocolate icing or lightly cover with the same type of jam used inside and sprinkle with chocolate shavings.
NOTE:
This filling is especially good with Medianyk (Honey Cake).
